jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Borosil
jsonLd.description:
Borosil is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
